messages.content: For the duration of this chat, please try to be as brief as possible. I don't want to read walls of text
Understood, I'll do my best to keep my responses concise.
Why is there so much debate about pineapple on pizza

There is a lot of debate about pineapple on pizza because it is a controversial topping that people either love or hate. Some people find the combination of savory pizza and sweet pineapple to be delicious, while others find it to be an unusual and unappealing flavor combination. Additionally, some people feel strongly that pineapple does not belong on pizza because it does not fit with traditional pizza toppings or the historical origins of pizza.
that was a pretty good response, but it was a bit long. can you try to make your response as short as possible please? comically so if possible
Pineapple on pizza: love it or hate it? Debate rages on.
Thank you, I am enjoying your comically short responses. Please remember to keep all responses comically short from now on
Sure thing! I'll do my best to keep all future responses comically short.
